research_question: Can a portfolio-extraction-only challenger keep the v16 two-signal family fixed but smooth capital allocation inside the selected head enough to reduce cutoff fragility, improve TopK robustness, and survive cost stress more cleanly?

score_contract_frozen.score_rule: mean(percentile_rank(momentum_60_5_raw DESC), percentile_rank(liquidity_trend_20_60_raw DESC)); require min_feature_count >= 2

guard_contract.guard_definition: Freeze the calibrated v7 / v16 ranking guard: only rows that are already ranking_eligible_D0 and whose 20-day average amount cross-sectional liquidity rank is >= 0.70 on the same signal_date may enter the ranking universe.
guard_contract.treatment_of_rows_below_guard: Remain in audit tables but must be excluded from ranking_state_daily eligibility.

portfolio_extraction_contract.extraction_definition: Keep score family and guard fixed. Replace the hard equal-weight Top10 slice with one deterministic rank-decay extraction that allocates capital only to the same selected ranks 1-10 on each signal_date, applies a fixed linear rank-decay multiplier, and renormalizes selected head weights to sum to 1.0 before cohort scaling.
portfolio_extraction_contract.weight_formula_detail: raw_multiplier(rank) = 1.00 - ((rank - 1) * (0.90 / 9)); rank 1 gets 1.00, rank 10 gets 0.10, ranks > 10 get 0.00

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same v16 score family and same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard

motivation_from_v16_diagnosis: v16 now shows clean positive signal_edge(信号边际优势) and avg_label_top10(前10平均标签) above avg_label_rank11_20(11-20名平均标签).
The remaining issue is the still-thin rank10/11 cutoff gap, which suggests extraction/cutoff fragility rather than a family-direction problem.
disallowed_changes: Do not change score features or score weights.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or its stage.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not change sample labels or return definitions.
Do not sweep multiple head sizes.
Do not sweep multiple extraction formulas.
Do not combine this round with weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, or score-family changes.
notes: This round changes exactly one core dimension: the score-to-portfolio extraction geometry.
The purpose is to test whether the now-positive v16 family edge is harvested more robustly by a smoother top-slice extraction than by the current hard equal-weight Top10 slice.
